name: Theory
description_short: Unable to verify company profile. Website returns access denied error, preventing factual data collection for Theory.
description_long: Theory's website (theory.com) is currently inaccessible due to server restrictions, returning an HTTP 403 Access Denied error. Without access to official company information, product details, terms, or service descriptions, a factual profile cannot be reliably constructed. The company is currently categorized as a payday-alternative lender, but this cannot be verified against actual website content. To build an accurate CreditDoc profile, direct access to Theory's website or verified third-party documentation (SEC filings, regulatory records, news articles, customer reviews from established platforms) would be required. Any profile generated without this data would violate the requirement to build FACTUAL company information. The 'Access Denied' error may indicate the company has changed domains, restricted web access, ceased operations, or implemented server-level restrictions that prevent automated data collection.
